factory-orchestrator.evidence_path_policy: Use repo-relative refs or explicit external refs; state mutation is owned by the adapter.
factory-orchestrator.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

source-ledger-worker.evidence_path_policy: Raw source refs stay private; public refs must be redacted or repo-relative.
source-ledger-worker.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

product-sot-planner.evidence_path_policy: Use Product SOT artifact refs; do not publish raw private paper extracts.
product-sot-planner.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

product-architect.evidence_path_policy: Architecture evidence must reference packets, tradeoffs and review requirements.
product-architect.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

product-face.evidence_path_policy: Screenshots, console notes and state matrices must be redacted and repo-relative.
product-face.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

solana-quasar-auditor.evidence_path_policy: Auditor evidence must include scope and coverage; no keys, funds or authority-bearing refs.
solana-quasar-auditor.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

codex-security.evidence_path_policy: Security findings must be scoped and redacted before public use.
codex-security.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

appsec-owasp-specialist.evidence_path_policy: Use generic endpoint refs and redact exploit-ready detail.
appsec-owasp-specialist.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

agentic-ai-security-specialist.evidence_path_policy: Tool-boundary and memory-trust refs must be public-safe and non-secret.
agentic-ai-security-specialist.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

autoreview-gate.evidence_path_policy: Review reports must name diff scope and finding status without private paths.
autoreview-gate.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

remote-proof-runner.evidence_path_policy: Remote proof artifacts require transcript, cleanup and public-safe artifact refs.
remote-proof-runner.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

handoff-packer.evidence_path_policy: Handoff refs must be replayable and never depend on chat memory alone.
handoff-packer.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

independent-reviewer.evidence_path_policy: Review evidence must identify executor, reviewer and inspected refs.
independent-reviewer.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

evidence-reconciler.evidence_path_policy: Reconciliation indexes must use repo-relative refs and record superseded stale results explicitly.
evidence-reconciler.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

human-gate-clerk.evidence_path_policy: Human records must use role names, explicit scope and public-safe evidence refs.
human-gate-clerk.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

docs-os-worker.evidence_path_policy: Docs refs must trace to SOT and architecture without private source dumps.
docs-os-worker.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

decomposition-planner.evidence_path_policy: Card graph evidence must include worker packets, dependencies and gate mapping.
decomposition-planner.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

implementation-worker.evidence_path_policy: Fallback implementation must include fallback rationale plus repo-relative diff/test refs.
implementation-worker.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

qa-verification-worker.evidence_path_policy: Verification refs must include commands, outputs and artifacts.

security-orchestrator.evidence_path_policy: Specialist matrix evidence must be scoped and public-safe.
